scripts.build: tsc -p src/tsconfig.json && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && (cd src && find . -name '*.ts' -exec cp --parents {} ../dist/ \;)

name: grenton-ts
author: Rajmund Paczkowski <rajmund.paczkowski@gmail.com>
description: TypeScript API library providing type-safe wrappers for Grenton smart home hardware modules
